CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ON DECK CAPITAL, INC.'s Motion For Entering Judgment Pursuant To Defendants Default Under Settlement And Release Agreement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for entering judgment pursuant to defendant's default under settlement and release agreement" is granted.

Order signed. Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
